title: 【077】CSS轮廓
excerpt:
outline p { border: 2px solid #$caf50;} p.a {/*outline-style: dotted;outline-width: 4px;outline-color: red;*/ outline: dotted 4px red; outline-offset: 5px;} p.b {/*outline-style: dashed;outline-width: thin;outline-color: green;*/ outline: dashed thin green; outline-offset: 5px;} p.c {/*outline-style: solid;outline-width: medium;outline-color: yellow;*/ outline: solid medium rgb(1, 56, 145); outline-offset: 5px;} p.d {/*outline-style: double;outline-width: thick;outline-color: blue;*/ outline: double thick rgb(216, 243, 11); outline-offset: 5px;}
CSS轮廓
content:
CSS轮廓：outline-style:dotted,dashed,solid,double,hidden,none


outline-color,outline-widthz:thin(1px),medium(3px),thick(5px),特定尺寸，以px,em为单位


outline-offset(轮廓偏移,增加边框和文字之间的空隙)，outline(轮廓简写)


(p.a+br)*4按回车
